name: @openai-oauth/firefox-add-on
description: Firefox add-on for OpenAI OAuth web sign-in.

scripts.dev: bun run build && web-ext run --source-dir dist
scripts.lint:add-on: bun run build && web-ext lint --source-dir dist
scripts.pack: bun run build && rm -rf dist-pack && web-ext build --source-dir dist --artifacts-dir dist-pack --overwrite-dest
